entry.title: VNEGNN Bindingsite - 10EX
entry.content:
Protein description

Isoform 4 of Glutamate receptor ionotropic, NMDA 1 from Homo sapiens. PDB 10EX is titled “SK5A-Matured apo state in complex with GluN1-GluN2B, full refinement.”

PDB metadata

  • PDB ID: 10EX
  • Structure title: SK5A-Matured apo state in complex with GluN1-GluN2B, full refinement
  • Protein description: Isoform 4 of Glutamate receptor ionotropic, NMDA 1
  • Source organism: Homo sapiens
  • Keywords: SIGNALING PROTEIN/Immune System
  • Initial release date: 2026-03-25T00:00:00+0000
  • Prediction source: VN-EGNN Hugging Face Space via the repository helper script
  • Top prediction label: Rank 1. Score: -0.00

Top prediction

Notes

This post was generated from the newest unposted protein-containing PDB entry available at generation time. The protein description and structure title were pulled from the RCSB PDB Data API.
entry.summary: Isoform 4 of Glutamate receptor ionotropic, NMDA 1 from Homo sapiens. PDB 10EX is titled "SK5A-Matured apo state in complex with GluN1-GluN2B, full refinement."

entry.title: VNEGNN Bindingsite - 13ZQ
entry.content:

entry.title: VNEGNN Bindingsite - 10OR
entry.content:

entry.title: VNEGNN Bindingsite - 10GW

entry.title: VNEGNN Bindingsite - 10DJ
